data.content:
Удав
Mythical snake that swallowed an elephant in the illustration and was compared to a hat by adults. Original name: удав, which is a type of large Asian snake.

Джунгли
Vast tropical rainforest where the story takes place, specifically referring to the dense jungle with mythological creatures like the giant snake. Original name: джунгли.

Учитель
Adult who advised the narrator not to draw outside of his understanding and expertise, especially about animals and geography. Original name: учитель.

Художник
Childhood aspiration of the narrator, a profession that he gave up after failing at drawing an inside-out snake and being ridiculed by adults. Original name: художник.

Летчик
Another career chosen after abandoning childhood aspirations to become an artist. Original name: летчик.

Китай
Country in East Asia, where the narrator mentioned it can be distinguished from Arizona. Original name: Китай.

Аризона
State of United States, used by the narrator as a comparison to distinguish between different places. Original name: Аризона.

Слон
The large mammal that was swallowed by the giant snake.

Тот человек
Human individual who survived a plane crash in the Sahara desert and decided to fix his broken engine alone for survival.

Маленький принц
Маленький принц is described as an unnamed prince who lived on a planet full of plants and creatures. He had the ability to understand the significance of small seeds that could become huge baobabs, which he considered important for life's beauty and fragility. The prince was curious about his surroundings, including the giant baobabs, and attempted to share his insights with others through drawings. Additionally, he warned about the potential dangers associated with these massive trees. He is also depicted as a human character in Antoine de Saint-Exupéry’s novella "Le Petit Prince".<SEP>A young prince character in the story "The Little Prince"<SEP>Young and naive prince who is confused by the behavior of a proud person<SEP>Young prince who feels embarrassed by the behavior of a proud person

Маленький человечек
Child appearing as an otherworldly visitor from space.

Я очень люблю закат.
Expressing a fondness for sunset by the unnamed prince.

Солнце зашло.

Знаешь… когда станет очень грустно, хорошо поглядеть, как заходит солнце…
Expressing a thought about looking at sunset when one feels very sad by the unnamed prince.

data.content:
Очень скоро я лучше узнал этот цветок
A person who deeply understood and appreciated a flower on the planet of Little Prince|

неведомая гостья
The relation name "Очень скоро я лучше узнал этот цветок, неведомая гостья" describes a character who is both beautiful and elegant. She looks at a small sprout without diverting her eyes, waits for the moment when the petals will open, invites Little Prince to go with her, gets offended that she is not grass, gets ready to present herself in a pleasing manner, reminds the Little Prince about having breakfast, and mentions a threat posed by tigers.

красавица
The narrator's name for a female character who does not reply to M. prince.

баробабов
A type of tree native to Madagascar in the story "The Little Prince"

Corporal Power
The power of the state should be reasonable. If you make your people rush into the sea, they will cause a revolution. I have the right to demand obedience because my commands are wise.
